content_body:
The holiday season is quickly approaching, and we are beginning to prepare all of our cabins for this special time. As guests call the office to make their reservations, they frequently ask if the cabin will be decorated for Christmas. Because our guests pay a substantially higher holiday rate to stay with us during this time of year (12/21-1/2), we feel that it is appropriate to give them the ultimate holiday experience in an effort to garner repeat business for your cabins.

 

For this reason, we are reaching out to all of our owners to see what can be done in each home for the holidays. We would like each cabin to have some type of holiday decor for guests, and we’d love to know how we can help expedite the decorating process for you. This year we are offering the option of having Cabin Rentals of Georgia purchase and install Christmas trees/decorations for you if you are unable to come to Blue Ridge to deck out your cabin. If you are interested in taking advantage of this service, please contact our office at (706-632-2246).

 

We are looking forward to this busy holiday season, and we hope to beautifully showcase your cabin to give our guests the ultimate Blue Ridge experience. Please let us know how you would like to decorate your cabin this year, and we will do all we can to help.

 

Thank you for the opportunity to serve you,

The CRG Team
title: Let Us Help with the Holiday Hassle
